company_name: Emerson (National Instruments is now a part of Emerson)
stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CSE / Information Science / Electronics & Electrical) M.E / M.Tech (Electronics)
date_of_joining: Jul 2025 to Dec 2025, we might extend the internship until Jun 2026 based on intern performance & business needs.

package_salary.ppo_ctc: ● Stipend during 6 months (July’25 to Dec’25) Internship : 45 K per month Note : Company might extend the internship until June 2026 based on interns performance. ● Salary after Internship (If PPO given), will be as under : → For B.E / B.Tech : CTC 14.66 LPA → For M.E / M.Tech : CTC 15.38 LPA Note : *Full Time opportunities are based on performance & business needs

selection_process_steps: Students must take the test in collages premises
